headline: Local London plumbers on-call in 30 minutes or less
subheadline: Premium leak repairs, burst pipes and boiler servicing with fixed upfront pricing.
about_text: Plumbify Services protects London homes and businesses from water damage with fast teams and 100% satisfaction follow-up.

services.title: Emergency Flood Response
services.description: Immediate shutoff and leak containment with full system service.

services.title: Pipe Repression & Repointing
services.description: Water-safe pipe replacers and welders for old and modern systems.

services.title: Smart Leak Detection
services.description: Infrared diagnostics and pressure tests for hidden pipe failures.

reviews.name: Hannah T.
reviews.quote: Fast, professional, and clean work—saved us from severe basement flooding.

reviews.name: Richard K.
reviews.quote: I love the same-day booking and fixed price, no surprises.

faqs.question: What’s your response time?
faqs.answer: We target 30 minutes for all London emergency calls.

faqs.question: Do you offer a service guarantee?
faqs.answer: Yes, all work has a 2-year measured workmanship guarantee.

service_area_text: Covering all London boroughs, from Canary Wharf to Camden, in every weather.
differentiators: 24/7 rapid deployment from multiple London hubs
No call-out fees for confirmed jobs
trust_proof: Member of City Plumbing Safety Alliance

metadata.title: Plumbify Services | London Emergency Plumbing
metadata.description: Plumbify delivers same-day emergency plumbing across London with fixed pricing and 24/7 teams.
